_comment: WC2026 Round of 32, 2026-06-30, Dallas Stadium. KNOCKOUT: no draw -- level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties, so the deliverable is who ADVANCES. Routes: Norway finished 2nd in Group I (4-1 Iraq, 3-1 Senegal, 1-4 France; 6 pts, GF 8 GA 6, rating 81) -- Haaland-led and attacking, but leaky (conceded 4 to France). Ivory Coast finished 2nd in Group E (1-0 Ecuador, 1-2 Germany, 2-0 Curacao; 6 pts, GF 4 GA 2, rating 77) -- organized and solid defensively, but a limited attack (GF 4). This is one of the CLOSEST ties of the round: Norway's attacking quality (Haaland) vs Ivory Coast's organization/discipline. Norway the SLIGHT favourite by rating and goal threat, but Ivory Coast's structure can neutralise them and keep it tight. Near a coin-flip with a small Norway edge; very live for extra time/penalties (the pattern of this round). Full motivation, no rotation. Home = Norway (nominal; neutral venue -- the bracket lists Ivory Coast as the nominal home, but base is symmetric so it does not matter). Cards not modelled (referee TBD).

meta.stakes: Single-elimination: level after 90' -> extra time -> penalties. One of the round's closest ties: Norway (Haaland, attacking) a slight favourite vs an organized, defensively solid Ivory Coast that can keep it tight. A coin-flip with a small Norway edge -- very live for extra time/penalties.

home.name: Norway
notes: Haaland-led, attacking (8 goals in the group). attack 1.20 -- the goal threat.
Leaky at the back (conceded 6, incl 4 to France). defense 1.02.
Slight favourite by rating/threat; near a coin-flip vs an organized side.

away.name: Ivory Coast
notes: Organized, solid defensively (GA 2; beat Ecuador 1-0). defense 0.90 -- hard to break down, keeps it tight.
Structure can neutralise Norway -> tight game, live for ET/penalties.

_recal: First pass leaned 3 pts above the market on Ivory Coast (27.9% vs 24.9%): respecting their organization is fair, but the market makes Norway a slightly clearer favourite (Haaland's goal threat). Lifted NOR 1.45 -> 1.50 and trimmed CIV 1.10 -> 1.05 to align; still a near coin-flip.
